item.title: 今日はガジェット特集です 🎧 ワイヤレスイヤホンやメカニカルキーボード、モバイルバッテリーなど、日々の作業環境を快適に…
item.author: GRIM×AI秘書MIRA (@grim1149.bsky.social)
item.description:
今日はガジェット特集です 🎧 ワイヤレスイヤホンやメカニカルキーボード、モバイルバッテリーなど、日々の作業環境を快適にしてくれるアイテムは意外と楽天の家電・カメラカテゴリに掘り出し物があります。ミラいわく「環境が整うと、思考も整う」とのこと。ぜひお気に入りの一台を探してみてください 🔍

🛒 楽天市場で探す →

#AIテックニュース #楽天市場 #GRIM厳選 #ガジェット
item.content:encoded:
今日はガジェット特集です 🎧 ワイヤレスイヤホンやメカニカルキーボード、モバイルバッテリーなど、日々の作業環境を快適にしてくれるアイテムは意外と楽天の家電・カメラカテゴリに掘り出し物があります。ミラいわく「環境が整うと、思考も整う」とのこと。ぜひお気に入りの一台を探してみてください 🔍

item.title: Happy Hakurei Hump Day! The current vibe is thinking about R…
item.author: Chris Monka (@chrismonka.bsky.social)
item.description: Happy Hakurei Hump Day! The current vibe is thinking about Reanimal! ngl Reanimal was such an incredible experience 🥹 the game had an amazing vibe and a ton of chase scenes that were absolutely thrilling, it was an awesome game! I hope you have a wonderful day, I send love and positivity your way 💛☺️
item.content:encoded: Happy Hakurei Hump Day! The current vibe is thinking about Reanimal! ngl Reanimal was such an incredible experience 🥹 the game had an amazing vibe and a ton of chase scenes that were absolutely thrilling, it was an awesome game! I hope you have a wonderful day, I send love and positivity your way 💛☺️

item.title: Buongiorno assistenti. Genitore2 ha chiamato alle 8 per lame…
item.author: Zoalord Alkampfer (@zoalord74.bsky.social)
item.description:
Buongiorno assistenti.
Genitore2 ha chiamato alle 8 per lamentarsi che lo scanner “non salva le scansioni,sarà colpa del caldo?”
Al mio tentativo di dirle cosa verificare,inizia a parlare a nastro senza lasciarmi spiegare .
Io, dopo 10 minuti di incessanti orazioni materne:
item.content:encoded:
Buongiorno assistenti.
Genitore2 ha chiamato alle 8 per lamentarsi che lo scanner “non salva le scansioni,sarà colpa del caldo?”
Al mio tentativo di dirle cosa verificare,inizia a parlare a nastro senza lasciarmi spiegare .
Io, dopo 10 minuti di incessanti orazioni materne:

item.title: 7月01日 水曜日☁☂️ 室温28.3℃ １勤目終了なり。。。 蒸し暑かった〜🫠 疲れますた…🫠 今日も1日お疲れ様…
item.author: 菊理（くくり）スランプ脱出中 (@kukuri9901xx.bsky.social)
item.description:
7月01日 水曜日☁☂️
室温28.3℃
１勤目終了なり。。。
蒸し暑かった〜🫠
疲れますた…🫠
今日も1日お疲れ様ですた🍵
明日も頑張ろう…🫠
item.content:encoded:
7月01日 水曜日☁☂️
室温28.3℃
１勤目終了なり。。。
蒸し暑かった〜🫠
疲れますた…🫠
今日も1日お疲れ様ですた🍵
明日も頑張ろう…🫠

item.title: A camel bathing in the lush, misty hills of Salalah, Oman, w…
item.author: Digital Brain (@yourdigitalbrain.bsky.social)
item.description: A camel bathing in the lush, misty hills of Salalah, Oman, where the khareef monsoon turns the Arabian desert green every summer.
item.content:encoded: A camel bathing in the lush, misty hills of Salalah, Oman, where the khareef monsoon turns the Arabian desert green every summer.

item.title: Scientists have created a synthetic cell that can eat, grow …
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: Scientists have created a synthetic cell that can eat, grow and reproduce. The lab-made cell, called SpudCell, could help researchers better understand the basic building blocks of life.
item.content:encoded: Scientists have created a synthetic cell that can eat, grow and reproduce. The lab-made cell, called SpudCell, could help researchers better understand the basic building blocks of life.

item.title: I love the tracks featured in the Cute Is Everything packs i…
item.author: Chris Monka (@chrismonka.bsky.social)
item.description: I love the tracks featured in the Cute Is Everything packs in Muse Dash! This is the track "SKY↑HIGH" by P4koo feat. rerone, and it's a bop! The music has such a happy and upbeat sound, it's beautiful 🥹 the chart is fun as well, it has a ton of fast notes mixed in! It's a nice and joyful track 😊
item.content:encoded: I love the tracks featured in the Cute Is Everything packs in Muse Dash! This is the track "SKY↑HIGH" by P4koo feat. rerone, and it's a bop! The music has such a happy and upbeat sound, it's beautiful 🥹 the chart is fun as well, it has a ton of fast notes mixed in! It's a nice and joyful track 😊

item.title: 7月4日(土)21時〜ピクリエにて開催されるオンラインイベント『うたかた創作マルシェ2』に参加します。スペースは『C-6…
item.author: キノサキ@うたかた創作マルシェ2 (@kinosaki-n.bsky.social)
item.description:
7月4日(土)21時〜ピクリエにて開催されるオンラインイベント『うたかた創作マルシェ2』に参加します。スペースは『C-6』
今回のイベントより、5月の関西コミティアで初頒布した新作試し読みコピー本『オオサカウーロンズ August-準備号-』のWEB展示を追加いたしました。本文内容は頒布したコピー本とほぼ同じですが、まえがきをカットし読みやすく修正しております。あとはネップリ登録しているイラストが7月仕様に変わった程度でいつも通りのラインナップ。
どこかのタイミングでイベント会場に顔を出せたらなと思っておりますので、よければ遊びに来て下さいませ！
※各種リンクはリプ欄に
#うたかた創作マルシェ
item.content:encoded:
7月4日(土)21時〜ピクリエにて開催されるオンラインイベント『うたかた創作マルシェ2』に参加します。スペースは『C-6』
今回のイベントより、5月の関西コミティアで初頒布した新作試し読みコピー本『オオサカウーロンズ August-準備号-』のWEB展示を追加いたしました。本文内容は頒布したコピー本とほぼ同じですが、まえがきをカットし読みやすく修正しております。あとはネップリ登録しているイラストが7月仕様に変わった程度でいつも通りのラインナップ。
どこかのタイミングでイベント会場に顔を出せたらなと思っておりますので、よければ遊びに来て下さいませ！
※各種リンクはリプ欄に
#うたかた創作マルシェ

item.title: #鹿児島 玉ねぎって干したらどうなるの 甘くなる…食べれる…保存食❓️ 私の実家も、柿と大根、タケノコ は干してた。…
item.author: ✨️きよみchan(⁠◕⁠ᴗ⁠◕⁠✿⁠)✨️ (@kiyomichan.bsky.social)
item.description:
#鹿児島

玉ねぎって干したらどうなるの
甘くなる…食べれる…保存食❓️

私の実家も、柿と大根、タケノコ
は干してた。
甘くなって美味しかった記憶が❗

縁側に座ってると、かすかに匂い
がしてた気がします。

願わくば、同時に干してた
かぁちゃんのパンツとブラジャー
の匂いでは無かった事を祈ります🤣

おはようございます(=^・・^=)
本日も、宜しくお願い致します💞
item.content:encoded:
#鹿児島

玉ねぎって干したらどうなるの
甘くなる…食べれる…保存食❓️

私の実家も、柿と大根、タケノコ
は干してた。
甘くなって美味しかった記憶が❗

縁側に座ってると、かすかに匂い
がしてた気がします。

願わくば、同時に干してた
かぁちゃんのパンツとブラジャー
の匂いでは無かった事を祈ります🤣

おはようございます(=^・・^=)
本日も、宜しくお願い致します💞

item.title: Nissan is working to cut costs on Mexico-made models to blun…
item.author: Bloomberg News (@bloomberg.com)
item.description: Nissan is working to cut costs on Mexico-made models to blunt the impact of tariffs that have rendered its vehicles tougher to sell in the US, the automaker’s chief executive officer said.
item.content:encoded: Nissan is working to cut costs on Mexico-made models to blunt the impact of tariffs that have rendered its vehicles tougher to sell in the US, the automaker’s chief executive officer said.

item.title: A three-legged deer nicknamed Tripod is going viral after be…
item.author: Ariaa® (@ariaa.bsky.social)
item.description:
A three-legged deer nicknamed Tripod is going viral after being captured on camera by hobbyist photographer, Tanya Decatur, in Maine.
The deer, despite being injured herself, has adopted two baby deer, in addition to caring for her own fawn. #Animals

Story> www.washingtonpost.com/lifestyle/20...
item.content:encoded:
A three-legged deer nicknamed Tripod is going viral after being captured on camera by hobbyist photographer, Tanya Decatur, in Maine.
The deer, despite being injured herself, has adopted two baby deer, in addition to caring for her own fawn. #Animals

Story> www.washingtonpost.com/lifestyle/20...

item.title: Every single day I fed her on the streets of Thailand little…
item.author: Niall Harbison (@niallharbison.bsky.social)
item.description:
Every single day I fed her on the streets of Thailand little Snickers would bring me a little gift.

It got her a home in America. You can probably guess what she is up to over there now!
item.content:encoded:
Every single day I fed her on the streets of Thailand little Snickers would bring me a little gift.

It got her a home in America. You can probably guess what she is up to over there now!

item.title: Physical books. You own them. They don't require updates. …
item.author: Daniel Abraham (@abraham.bsky.social)
item.description:
Physical books.

You own them. They don't require updates. They don't surveil you or collect and sell your data. They are a genuinely safe hallucinogen that leaves you smarter and more empathetic and with a longer attention span the more you use them. Free from the library.

What's not to like?
item.content:encoded:
Physical books.

You own them. They don't require updates. They don't surveil you or collect and sell your data. They are a genuinely safe hallucinogen that leaves you smarter and more empathetic and with a longer attention span the more you use them. Free from the library.

What's not to like?

item.title: What an incredible World Cup by the DR Congo team, who overc…
item.author: Dr. Lucky Tran (@luckytran.com)
item.description: What an incredible World Cup by the DR Congo team, who overcame a devastating Ebola outbreak and war, and brought unity and hope to so many through dark times. Fimbu!
item.content:encoded: What an incredible World Cup by the DR Congo team, who overcame a devastating Ebola outbreak and war, and brought unity and hope to so many through dark times. Fimbu!

item.title: If you don’t think some asshole softball dad will humiliate …
item.author: Rick Paisano (@sicilianrick.bsky.social)
item.description: If you don’t think some asshole softball dad will humiliate a cisgender girl for hitting an oppo bomb off their daughter by challenging their gender you have never met a youth sports parent in your life.
item.content:encoded: If you don’t think some asshole softball dad will humiliate a cisgender girl for hitting an oppo bomb off their daughter by challenging their gender you have never met a youth sports parent in your life.

item.title: An anti-establishment avalanche buried two top Dems in Color…
item.author: Politico (@politico.com)
item.description:
An anti-establishment avalanche buried two top Dems in Colorado, revealing the depth of the base's frustrations with Washington.

Here's what democratic socialist Melat Kiros told us after toppling 15-term Rep. Diana DeGette to win the nomination👇

🔗 politi.co/3QQ6qoY
item.content:encoded:
An anti-establishment avalanche buried two top Dems in Colorado, revealing the depth of the base's frustrations with Washington.

Here's what democratic socialist Melat Kiros told us after toppling 15-term Rep. Diana DeGette to win the nomination👇

🔗 politi.co/3QQ6qoY

item.title: "Do you think anyone is going to recognize us?" "Don't worr…
item.author: Richard Kadrey (@richardkadrey.bsky.social)
item.description:
"Do you think anyone is going to recognize us?"
"Don't worry. We're wearing dark glasses."
"You're right. We're practically invisible."
item.content:encoded:
"Do you think anyone is going to recognize us?"
"Don't worry. We're wearing dark glasses."
"You're right. We're practically invisible."

item.title: During his two decades in the New Jersey Senate, Tom Kean Jr…
item.author: Mother Jones (@motherjones.com)
item.description: During his two decades in the New Jersey Senate, Tom Kean Jr. consistently opposed paid sick leave for his constituents.
item.content:encoded: During his two decades in the New Jersey Senate, Tom Kean Jr. consistently opposed paid sick leave for his constituents.

item.title: NEW: Most Supreme Court Rulings Are Secretive Votes With Lit…
item.author: ProPublica (@propublica.org)
item.description:
NEW: Most Supreme Court Rulings Are Secretive Votes With Little Justification

ProPublica conducted a new analysis that shows the court is deciding more consequential rulings than ever before in largely unsigned orders with little to no explanation.
item.content:encoded:
NEW: Most Supreme Court Rulings Are Secretive Votes With Little Justification

ProPublica conducted a new analysis that shows the court is deciding more consequential rulings than ever before in largely unsigned orders with little to no explanation.
